name: Chengbang Eco-Environment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chengbang Eco-Environment Co.,Ltd. primarily operates in the construction industry in China. The company provides integrated solutions in the areas of consulting planning, planning and design, investment and construction, and maintenance and operation management. The company provides urban and rural, tourism, and cultural creative planning services; landscape architectural and construction engineering services; landscaping services; services in the areas of water pollution control, soil remediation, and geological disaster management; and tourism and its information consultancy services. It also undertakes municipal public, lighting, water conservancy, and cultural relics protection works, as well as housing construction, municipal utility, and ancient building projects; and operates thematic scenic spots and characteristic towns. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Chengbang Landscape Co.,Ltd. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
